steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The authors claim all people naturally have an emotional attachment to where they live. The correct quotation must address home and its universal emotional power.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'universal emotional attachment to home': "Home is home, to the lowly as well as the great; and no rank, or color destroys its sacred character, its power over the mind, and the affections" directly supports the claim. ✓
  • Choice B — 'about Blue Beard': a narrative detail unrelated to home's emotional power. ✗
  • Choice C — 'warning against deceptive fame': about fame, not home or attachment. ✗
  • Choice D — 'restorative sleep': addresses sleep, not home. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
